Name: 2 bedroom flat to rent Townshend Road, London NW8
Intro Text: Portered block, private communal garden, lift service, prime location, St Johns's Wood
Description:
Spacious 2-Bed Flat to Rent – St John’s Wood

Available to rent, this spacious and fully furnished two-bedroom flat is adaptable for use as a three-bedroom. Set within a charming red-brick portered building, the property offers a bright entrance/dining hall, high ceilings, and lift access.

The kitchen opens directly onto a beautiful private communal garden, providing a perfect space for relaxing or enjoying time outdoors.

Ideal for sharers, the flat offers great flexibility and comfort, making it an excellent choice for those seeking both space and a prime location.

Situated just a 10-minute walk from St John’s Wood Station, the property is also close to Regent’s Park and surrounded by a variety of boutique shops, cafés, and restaurants.

‍
Features:
Portered block, private communal garden, lift service, prime location, can be used as 3 bed flat
5 mins walk to Regents Park, a quiet lovely neighbourhood

Name: Lovely Two Bedroom Flat with Balcony, can be Converted  to a Three Bedrooms Near Regent’s Park
Intro Text: A beautifully presented second floor apartment located in the sought after Townshend Court
Description:
Lovely Two Bedroom Flat with Balcony, can be Converted  to a Three Bedrooms Near Regent’s Park 

A beautifully presented second-floor apartment located in the sought-after Townshend Court, offering approximately 60 square metres of well-designed living space.

Originally a three-bedroom flat, the property has been thoughtfully converted into a spacious two-bedroom home, creating a more comfortable and open layout ideal for students or professional sharers.

The flat is bright and quiet and features a private balcony along with access to a well-maintained communal garden which is perfect for relaxing. Set within a secure, portered building, it offers both convenience and peace of mind.

Location highlights include a five-minute walk to Regent’s Park, a ten-minute walk to St John’s Wood Station and a fifteen-minute walk to Baker Street Station.

The apartment comes fully furnished and is ready to move into.

‍
Features: Balcony, communal private garden, porter, clean and quite area
